description.en: JoAi is a platform for creating and managing your own AI agents.
description.de: JoAi ist eine Plattform für das Erstellen und Verwalten eigener AI-Agenten.
description.fr: JoAi est une plateforme qui permet de créer et de gérer vos propres agents IA.
description.es: JoAi es una plataforma para crear y gestionar tus propios agentes de IA.
description.ro: JoAi este o platforma pentru crearea si gestionarea propriilor tai agenti AI.

warp.name: JoAi: Delete Element

description.en: Permanently remove an element from your agent.
description.de: Entferne ein Element dauerhaft von deinem Agenten.

warp.bot: Use this when the user wants to remove an element. If the user refers to an element by name, list elements first to find the matching ID.

inputs.name: Element ID

description.en: The ID of the element to delete
description.de: Die ID des zu löschenden Elements

inputs.bot: The element hash ID. If the user refers to an element by name, list elements first to find the matching ID.

description.en: Edit an existing element's name, type, content, or prompt.
description.de: Bearbeite den Namen, Typ, Inhalt oder Prompt eines bestehenden Elements.

description.en: JoAi is a platform for creating and managing your own AI agents.

warp.name: JoAi: Update Element

description.en: Edit an existing element's name, type, content, or prompt.
description.de: Bearbeite den Namen, Typ, Inhalt oder Prompt eines bestehenden Elements.

warp.bot: Use this when the user wants to modify an existing element. If the user refers to an element by name, list elements first to find the matching ID.

inputs.name: Element ID

description.en: The ID of the element to update
description.de: Die ID des zu aktualisierenden Elements

inputs.bot: The element hash ID. If the user refers to an element by name, list elements first to find the matching ID.

inputs.name: Name

description.en: Updated name for this element
description.de: Aktualisierter Name für dieses Element

inputs.bot: A new name for this element, if the user wants to rename it.

inputs.name: Type

description.en: Updated element type
description.de: Aktualisierter Elementtyp

inputs.bot: The updated element type (e.g., text, image, template, prompt).

inputs.name: Content

description.en: Updated content or body of this element
description.de: Aktualisierter Inhalt oder Text dieses Elements

inputs.bot: The updated content, text, or body for this element.

inputs.name: Prompt

description.en: Updated AI prompt for generating this element's content
description.de: Aktualisierter KI-Prompt zur Generierung des Elementinhalts

inputs.bot: An updated generation prompt for this element.

description.en: Permanently remove a variation (including its images) from an element.

warp.name: JoAi: Delete Element Variation

description.en: Permanently remove a variation (including its images) from an element.
description.de: Entferne dauerhaft eine Variation (einschließlich ihrer Bilder) aus einem Element.

warp.bot: Use this when the user wants to remove an unwanted variation. Use list_element_variations first to find IDs.

inputs.name: Element ID

description.en: The ID of the parent element
description.de: Die ID des übergeordneten Elements

inputs.bot: The element hash ID this variation belongs to.

inputs.name: Variation ID

description.en: The ID of the variation to delete
description.de: Die ID der zu löschenden Variation

inputs.bot: The variation hash ID. Use list_element_variations to find IDs.

description.en: Generate a new variation of an existing element using AI, optionally guided by custom instructions.
description.de: Generiere mithilfe von KI eine neue Variation eines bestehenden Elements, optional gesteuert durch individuelle Anweisungen.

description.en: JoAi is a platform for creating and managing your own AI agents.

warp.name: JoAi: Generate Element Variation

description.en: Generate a new variation of an existing element using AI, optionally guided by custom instructions.
description.de: Generiere mithilfe von KI eine neue Variation eines bestehenden Elements, optional gesteuert durch individuelle Anweisungen.

warp.bot: Use this when the user wants an alternative version of an existing element. If the user refers to an element by name, list elements first to find the matching ID.

inputs.name: Element ID

description.en: The ID of the element to vary
description.de: Die ID des Elements, von dem eine Variation erstellt werden soll

inputs.bot: The element hash ID. If the user refers to an element by name, list elements first to find the matching ID.

inputs.name: Prompt

description.en: Optional instructions for generating the variation
description.de: Optionale Anweisungen zur Generierung der Variation

inputs.bot: Optional guidance for how the variation should differ — e.g., 'make it more formal', 'shorter version', 'different tone'.

description.en: Update an element variation's label, aspect ratio, or spec overrides.
description.de: Aktualisiere das Label, das Seitenverhältnis oder die Spec-Überschreibungen einer Element-Variation.

description.en: JoAi is a platform for creating and managing your own AI agents.
description.de: JoAi ist eine Plattform für das Erstellen und Verwalten eigener AI-Agenten.
description.fr: JoAi est une plateforme qui permet de créer et de gérer vos propres agents IA.

description.ro: JoAi este o platforma pentru crearea si gestionarea propriilor tai agenti AI.

warp.name: JoAi: Update Element Variation

description.en: Update an element variation's label, aspect ratio, or spec overrides.
description.de: Aktualisiere das Label, das Seitenverhältnis oder die Spec-Überschreibungen einer Element-Variation.

warp.bot: Use this when the user wants to relabel a variation or change its aspect ratio. Use list_element_variations first to find variation IDs.

inputs.name: Element ID

description.en: The ID of the parent element
description.de: Die ID des übergeordneten Elements

inputs.bot: The element hash ID this variation belongs to.

inputs.name: Variation ID

description.en: The ID of the variation to update
description.de: Die ID der zu aktualisierenden Variation

inputs.bot: The variation hash ID. Use list_element_variations to find IDs.

inputs.name: Label

description.en: Human-readable label for the variation
description.de: Lesbares Label für die Variation

inputs.bot: An optional new label, e.g. 'Dark moody', 'Outdoor scene'.

inputs.name: Aspect Ratio

description.en: Aspect ratio (e.g. 1:1, 16:9, 9:16)
description.de: Seitenverhältnis (z.B. 1:1, 16:9, 9:16)

inputs.bot: Optional aspect ratio for the variation images.

warp.name: JoAi: Delete Media

description.en: Permanently remove a media file from your agent's media library.
description.de: Entferne eine Mediendatei dauerhaft aus der Medienbibliothek deines Agenten.

warp.bot: Use this when the user wants to remove a media file. If the user refers to media by label, list media first to find the matching ID.

description.de: Die ID der zu löschenden Medien

inputs.bot: The media hash ID. If the user refers to media by label, list media first to find the matching ID.

warp.name: JoAi: Create Project

description.en: Create a new project for your agent to organize work, content production, or ongoing initiatives.
description.de: Erstelle ein neues Projekt für deinen Agenten, um Arbeit, Content-Produktion oder laufende Initiativen zu organisieren.

warp.bot: Use this when the user wants to start a new project. Help them define a clear name and purpose.

inputs.name: Name

description.en: A name for this project
description.de: Ein Name für dieses Projekt

inputs.bot: A concise name for this project (e.g., 'Q2 Marketing Campaign', 'Product Launch').

inputs.name: Brief

description.en: Creative brief or description of this project
description.de: Kreativ-Brief oder Beschreibung dieses Projekts

inputs.bot: A short creative brief outlining this project's goals and scope.

warp.name: JoAi: Studio Export

description.en: Export the final asset from a studio project to a permanent shareable URL.
description.de: Exportiere das fertige Asset eines Studio-Projekts zu einer dauerhaften, teilbaren URL.

warp.bot: Use this when the user wants to finalize and export a studio project. The project must be in 'composed' status. Returns the public export URL and asset download links.

inputs.name: Project ID

description.en: The ID of the studio project to export
description.de: Die ID des zu exportierenden Studio-Projekts

inputs.bot: The project hash ID. If the user refers to a project by name, list projects first to find the matching ID.

description.en: Trigger your agent to produce content for a studio project — generate text, images, or other creative output based on instructions.
description.de: Lasse deinen Agenten Inhalte für ein Studio-Projekt produzieren — erstelle Text, Bilder oder andere kreative Ausgaben basierend auf Anweisungen.

warp.name: JoAi: Studio Produce

description.en: Trigger your agent to produce content for a studio project — generate text, images, or other creative output based on instructions.
description.de: Lasse deinen Agenten Inhalte für ein Studio-Projekt produzieren — erstelle Text, Bilder oder andere kreative Ausgaben basierend auf Anweisungen.

warp.bot: Use this when the user wants to generate or produce content for a specific studio project. Ask for the project ID and what to produce.

inputs.name: Project ID

description.en: The ID of the studio project
description.de: Die ID des Studio-Projekts

inputs.bot: The project hash ID. If the user refers to a project by name, list projects first to find the matching ID.

description.en: Send a message or instruction to the media studio to build or update a project.
description.de: Sende eine Nachricht oder Anweisung an das Media Studio, um ein Projekt zu erstellen oder zu aktualisieren.

description.en: JoAi is a platform for creating and managing your own AI agents.
description.de: JoAi ist eine Plattform für das Erstellen und Verwalten eigener AI-Agenten.
description.fr: JoAi est une plateforme qui permet de créer et de gérer vos propres agents IA.

warp.name: JoAi: Studio Send

description.en: Send a message or instruction to the media studio to build or update a project.
description.de: Sende eine Nachricht oder Anweisung an das Media Studio, um ein Projekt zu erstellen oder zu aktualisieren.

warp.bot: Use this when the user wants to create or continue a studio project — generative video, slideshow, or source-video clipping.

inputs.name: Message

description.en: Your instruction or message to the studio
description.de: Deine Anweisung oder Nachricht an das Studio

inputs.bot: The instruction or creative brief for the studio.

inputs.name: Project ID

description.en: Existing project ID to continue working on
description.de: Bestehende Projekt-ID, an der weitergearbeitet werden soll

inputs.bot: The project hash ID. Omit to create a new project.

inputs.name: Output Type

description.en: Primary output type: video, slideshow, or clips
description.de: Primärer Ausgabetyp: video, slideshow oder clips

inputs.bot: Use 'clips' to extract short clips from a source video. Use 'video' for generative video. Use 'slideshow' for image sequences.

inputs.name: Source URL

description.en: Direct video URL for clips projects
description.de: Direkte Video-URL für Clips-Projekte

inputs.bot: A direct .mp4, .mov, or .webm URL to use as the source video for clip extraction.
